message:
feat(tui): add responsive viewport layout system for dashboard views

Introduce a ViewportClass-based responsive layout system that adapts
the TUI home view to the terminal dimensions:

- ViewportClass enum: Compact (<96w or <28h), Regular, Wide (>=132w
  and >=36h)
- home_layout_constraints() returns different Layout::vertical
  constraint sets based on viewport class and whether a dashboard
  model is present
- Dashboard panels adapt column counts and row heights to available
  space
- Consistent footer and quick-help sizing across all viewport classes

This replaces the previous fixed-height layout that overflowed or
wasted space at extreme terminal sizes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
